metadata.author: ZeroFox - integration-support@zerofox.com
metadata.comments: Solution template for ZeroFox Threat Intelligence

metadata.description: Not used, but needed to pass arm-ttk test `Location-Should-Not-Be-Hardcoded`.  We instead use the `workspace-location` which is derived from the LA workspace
[concat('Region to deploy solution resources -- separate from location selection',parameters('location'))]
Workspace name for Log Analytics where Microsoft Sentinel is setup
resource group name where Microsoft Sentinel is setup
subscription id where Microsoft Sentinel is setup

connectorUiConfig.title: ZeroFox Enterprise - Advanced Dark Web
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: Collects advanced dark web data from the [ZeroFox](https://www.zerofox.com/threat-intelligence/) API into Microsoft Sentinel.

sampleQueries.description: List all ZeroFox Advanced Dark Web entries

dataTypes.name: ZeroFoxAdvancedDarkWeb_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
ZeroFoxAdvancedDarkWeb_CL
 | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
 | where isnotempty(Time)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and Write permissions are required.

customs.name: ZeroFox Personal Access Token (PAT)
customs.description: A ZeroFox PAT is required. You can get it in Data Connectors > [API Data Feeds](https://cloud.zerofox.com/data_connectors/api).

instructionSteps.title: Connect ZeroFox to Microsoft Sentinel
instructionSteps.description: To enable the connector, provide the required information below and click Connect.

dataFlows.transformKql: source | extend TimeGenerated = created_at, title_s = tostring(['title']), confidence_s = tostring(confidence), reliability_s = tostring(reliability), tlp_s = tostring(tlp), contents_d = contents, comments_d = comments, iocs_d = iocs, threat_types_d = threat_types, target_targets_s = tostring(target['targets']), target_regions_s = tostring(target['regions']), target_industries_s = tostring(target['industries']), languages_d = languages, actors_d = actors, tags_d = tags, source_col = ['source'], id_s = tostring(id) | extend source_names_d = source_col['names'], source_urls_d = source_col['urls'] | project TimeGenerated, title_s, confidence_s, reliability_s, tlp_s, contents_d, comments_d, iocs_d, threat_types_d, target_targets_s, target_regions_s, target_industries_s, languages_d, actors_d, tags_d, source_names_d, source_urls_d, id_s

columns.Name: TimeGenerated
columns.Description: The timestamp reflecting the time in which the event was generated

instructionSteps.title: Connect ZeroFox to Microsoft Sentinel
instructionSteps.description: To enable the connector, provide the required information below and click Connect.

dataFlows.transformKql: source | extend TimeGenerated = created_at, created_at_t = created_at, username_s = tostring(username), password_s = tostring(password), email_s = tostring(email), domain_s = tostring(domain), impacted_domain_s = tostring(impacted_domain), botnet_family_s = tostring(botnet_family), accessed_url_s = tostring(accessed_url), ip_s = tostring(ip), file_location_s = tostring(file_location), operating_system_s = tostring(operating_system), anti_viruses_s = tostring(anti_viruses), country_code_s = tostring(country_code), zip_code_s = tostring(zip_code), location_s = tostring(['location']), current_language_s = tostring(current_language), available_keyboards_s = tostring(available_keyboards), uac_s = tostring(uac), process_elevation_s = tostring(process_elevation), acquired_at_t = acquired_at, logged_at_t = logged_at, estimated_infected_at_t = estimated_infected_at, breached_at_t = breached_at, accessed_url_date_t = accessed_url_date, tags_s = tostring(tags), breach_id_s = tostring(breach_id), breach_name_s = tostring(breach_name), breach_url_s = tostring(breach_url) | project TimeGenerated, created_at_t, username_s, password_s, email_s, domain_s, impacted_domain_s, botnet_family_s, accessed_url_s, ip_s, file_location_s, operating_system_s, anti_viruses_s, country_code_s, zip_code_s, location_s, current_language_s, available_keyboards_s, uac_s, process_elevation_s, acquired_at_t, logged_at_t, estimated_infected_at_t, breached_at_t, accessed_url_date_t, tags_s, breach_id_s, breach_name_s, breach_url_s

columns.Name: TimeGenerated
columns.Description: The timestamp reflecting the time in which the event was generated

columns.Name: created_at_t
columns.Description: When the record was ingested into the system

columns.Name: breach_id_s
columns.Description: Breach ID the credentials were acquired from

dataFlows.transformKql: source | extend TimeGenerated = listed_at, listed_at_t = listed_at, ip_address_s = tostring(ip_address), bot_name_s = tostring(bot_name), c2_ip_address_s = tostring(c2_ip_address), c2_domain_s = tostring(c2_domain), is_common_domain_b = is_common_domain, file_location_s = tostring(file_location), operating_system_s = tostring(operating_system), anti_viruses_s = tostring(anti_viruses), country_code_s = tostring(country_code), zip_code_s = tostring(zip_code), location_s = tostring(['location']), current_language_s = tostring(current_language), available_keyboards_s = tostring(available_keyboards), uac_s = tostring(uac), process_elevation_s = tostring(process_elevation), acquired_at_t = acquired_at, logged_at_t = logged_at, estimated_infected_at_t = estimated_infected_at, breached_at_t = breached_at, tags_s = tostring(tags) | project TimeGenerated, listed_at_t, ip_address_s, bot_name_s, c2_ip_address_s, c2_domain_s, is_common_domain_b, file_location_s, operating_system_s, anti_viruses_s, country_code_s, zip_code_s, location_s, current_language_s, available_keyboards_s, uac_s, process_elevation_s, acquired_at_t, logged_at_t, estimated_infected_at_t, breached_at_t, tags_s

columns.Name: TimeGenerated
columns.Description: The timestamp reflecting the time in which the event was generated

columns.Name: ip_address_s
columns.Description: IP Address for the botnet record

columns.Name: listed_at_t
columns.Description: When the botnet was ingested into the system

columns.Name: bot_name_s
columns.Description: Botnet Family of the botnet record

columns.Name: c2_ip_address_s
columns.Description: Destination IP address of the botnet record

columns.Name: is_common_domain_b
columns.Description: Is the C2 Domain common (i.e. found in [Majestic Million's top 1M domains list](https://majestic.com/reports/majestic-million))

dataFlows.transformKql: source | extend TimeGenerated = created_at, created_at_t = created_at, content_audience_s = tostring(content_audience), forum_name_s = tostring(forum_name), forum_uuid_s = tostring(forum_uuid), general_topic_s = tostring(general_topic), language_code_s = tostring(language_code), network_type_s = tostring(network_type), site_type_s = tostring(site_type), parent_uuid_s = tostring(parent_uuid), post_body_s = tostring(post_body), timestamp_t = ['timestamp'], post_member_name_s = tostring(post_member_name), post_type_s = tostring(post_type), post_uuid_s = tostring(post_uuid), sequence_number_s = sequence_number, thread_name_s = tostring(thread_name), thread_url_s = tostring(thread_url), thread_uuid_s = tostring(thread_uuid), domain_s = tostring(domain), post_created_at_t = post_created_at | project TimeGenerated, created_at_t, content_audience_s, forum_name_s, forum_uuid_s, general_topic_s, language_code_s, network_type_s, site_type_s, parent_uuid_s, post_body_s, timestamp_t, post_member_name_s, post_type_s, post_uuid_s, sequence_number_s, thread_name_s, thread_url_s, thread_uuid_s, domain_s, post_created_at_t

columns.Name: TimeGenerated
columns.Description: The timestamp reflecting the time in which the event was generated

columns.Name: network_type_s
columns.Description: Network type describes the network from which the content is sourced e.g. open = surface web, tor = dark web

columns.Name: site_type_s
columns.Description: Site type categorizes the kind of source site e.g. news, blogs, discussions, chat, market, paste, imageboard, ransomware_blog

columns.Name: parent_uuid_s
columns.Description: If this post is a reply to another post (ParentPost), then the parent_uuid is the post_uuid of the ParentPost

columns.Name: sequence_number_s
columns.Description: Position of the post within a forum thread

columns.Name: created_at_t
columns.Description: When the record was ingested into the system

expired_s = tostring(expired), type_s = tostring(['type']), value_s = tostring(value), domain_s = tostring(domain), filename_s = tostring(filename), url_s = tostring(url), confidence_col = confidence, ttl_s = tostring(ttl), ransom_note_s = tostring(ransom_note), top_1m_b = top_1m, ip_addresses_s = tostring(ip_addresses), tags_s = tostring(tags), ports_s = toint(ports), malware_family_s = tostring(malware_family), sha1_s = tostring(sha1), sha256_s = tostring(sha256), sha512_s = tostring(sha512), md5_s = tostring(md5), c2_ip_addresses_s = tostring(c2_ip_addresses), c2_domains_s = tostring(c2_domains), events_col = events, file_location_s = tostring(file_location), cloud_provider_s = tostring(cloud_provider), bot_name_s = tostring(bot_name), note_s = tostring(note), asn_s = tostring(asn), asn_description_s = tostring(asn_description), source_registry_s = tostring(source_registry), ttp_ids_s = tostring(ttp_ids), emails_s = tostring(emails), crypto_wallets_s = tostring(confidence_col['description']), events_threat_type_s = tostring(events_col['threat_type']), events_date_t = todatetime(events_col['date']) | project TimeGenerated, first_seen_t, last_seen_t, created_at_s, last_modified_s, expired_s, type_s, value_s, domain_s, filename_s, url_s, confidence_value_s, confidence_description_s, ttl_s, ransom_note_s, top_1m_b, ip_addresses_s, tags_s, ports_s, malware_family_s, sha1_s, sha256_s, sha512_s, md5_s, c2_ip_addresses_s, c2_domains_s, events_threat_type_s, events_date_t, file_location_s, cloud_provider_s, bot_name_s, note_s, asn_s, asn_description_s, source_registry_s, ttp_ids_s, emails_s, crypto_wallets_s, note_urls_s, ransomware_name_s

columns.Description: Expose Publish Date of the threat

columns.Description: Expose Internal Date of the threat

instructionSteps.title: Connect ZeroFox to Microsoft Sentinel
instructionSteps.description: To enable the connector, provide the required information below and click Connect.

properties.descriptionHtml:
Note: Please refer to the following before installing the solution:

• Review the solution Release Notes

• There may be known issues pertaining to this Solution, please refer to them before installing.

The ZeroFox solution for Microsoft Sentinel enables you to ingest ZeroFox Threat Intelligence into Microsoft Sentinel using the ZeroFox API.

Underlying Microsoft Technologies used:

This solution takes a dependency on the following technologies, and some of these dependencies either may be in Preview state or might result in additional ingestion or operational costs:

  1. Azure Monitor Logs Ingestion API.

Data Connectors: 18

Learn more about Microsoft Sentinel | Learn more about Solutions
